quotes.quote:
To attain knowledge, add things everyday.
To obtain wisdom, remove things everyday.
quotes.author: Lao Tzu

quotes.quote:
Drink coffee!
Do stupid things faster...
quotes.author: The Flash

quotes.quote: Glück ist das einzige, das sich verdoppelt, wenn man es teilt.
quotes.author: Albert Schweizer

quotes.quote: Normal people scare me... but not as much as I scare them.
quotes.author: Quasimodo

quotes.quote:
Si tu donnes un poisson à un homme, il se nourrira une fois.
Si tu lui apprends à pêcher, il se nourrira toute sa vie.
quotes.author: Ho-Kouan Tseu

quotes.quote:
Ti indicherò un filtro amoroso senza veleni, senza erbe, senza formule magiche:
se vuoi essere amato, ama !
quotes.author: Lucio Anneo Seneca

quotes.quote: Whether you think you can, or you think you can't - you're probably right.
quotes.author: Henry Ford

quotes.quote:
The difficult is what takes a little time.
The impossible is what takes a little longer.
quotes.author: Fridtjof Nansen

quotes.quote: Without deviation from the norm, progress is not possible.
quotes.author: Frank Zappa

quotes.quote: If you're going through hell, keep going.
quotes.author: Winston Churchill

quotes.quote: Enjoy when you can, and endure when you must.
quotes.author: Johann Wolfgang von Goethe

quotes.quote: Endure when you can, and enjoy when you must.
quotes.author: Unknown rugby player

quotes.quote: I don't believe in astrology; I'm a Sagittarius and we're skeptical.
quotes.author: Arthur C. Clarke

quotes.quote: It's not easy taking my problems one at a time when they refuse to get in line.
quotes.author: Ashleigh Brilliant

quotes.quote: We didn't lose the game; we just ran out of time.
quotes.author: Vince Lombardi

quotes.quote: The difference between ordinary and extraordinary is that little extra.
quotes.author: Jimmy Johnson

quotes.quote: When you start treating people like people, they become people.
quotes.author: Paul Vitale

quotes.quote: When you throw dirt, you lose ground.
quotes.author: Texan Proverb

quotes.quote: To know the road ahead, ask those coming back.
quotes.author: Chinese Proverb

quotes.quote:
The computer can't tell you the emotional story.
It can give you the exact mathematical design, but what's missing is the eyebrows.
quotes.author: Frank Zappa

quotes.quote:
Where ever you're going, don't walk the first.
If you do, people will think you know where you're going.
quotes.author: Frank Zappa

quotes.quote: Shoot low, they're riding Shetlands.
quotes.author: Frank Zappa

quotes.quote: Beware of the fish people, they are the true enemy.
quotes.author: Frank Zappa

quotes.quote: I'll do the stupid thing first and then you shy people follow...
quotes.author: Frank Zappa

quotes.quote: Anything played wrong twice in a row is the beginning of an arrangement.
quotes.author: Frank Zappa

quotes.quote: Do the right thing, even if no one is looking. This is called integrity.
quotes.author: Charles Marshall

quotes.quote: Be stronger than your excuses.
quotes.author: unknown

quotes.quote: If you think good employees are expensive, try bad employees.
quotes.author: Oleg Vishnepolsky

quotes.quote:
Clients do not come first. Employees come first.
If you take care of your employees, they will take care of your clients.
quotes.author: Richard Branson

quotes.quote:
A dream writen down with a date becomes a _GOAL_.
A goal broken down into steps becomes a _PLAN_.
A plan backed by _ACTION_ makes your dreams come true.
quotes.author: Greg S. Reid

quotes.quote: A goal without a plan is just a wish
quotes.author: Antoine de Saint-Exupéry

quotes.quote: The bitterness of poor quality remains long after the sweetness of low price is forgotten.
quotes.author: T.B. Lehon

quotes.quote:
Good, cheap, fast ... pick two.
If it's fast and cheap it won't be good.
If it's cheap and good it won't be fast.
If it's fast and good it wont be cheap.
quotes.author: Jim Jarmusch

quotes.quote: Wer immer tut, was er schon kann, bleibt immer das, was er schon ist.
quotes.author: Henry Ford

quotes.quote:
The real job of a leader is not about being in charge.
It's about taking care of those in your charge.
quotes.author: Simon Sinek

quotes.quote: Challenges are what make life interesting and overcoming them is what makes life meaningful.
quotes.author: Joshua J. Marine

quotes.quote: Those who do not remember the past are condemned to repeat it.
quotes.author: George Santayana

quotes.quote:
Anleitung für einen guten Start in den Tag:
1. Mach Dir einen grünen Smoothie.
2. Ignoriere jede Kritik dazu:
   «Mimimi, da ist ja Alkohol drin, mimimi das ist ja ein Mojito, mimimi...»
quotes.author: Der frühe Vogel / The Early Bird

quotes.quote:
If you say 'fuck off' backwards, it still says 'fuck off'...
but in an Irish accent.
quotes.author: unknown

quotes.quote:
My grandfather once told me that there were two kinds of people:
→ those who do the work and those who take the credit.
He told me to try to be in the first group:
→ there was much less competition.
quotes.author: Indira Gandhi

quotes.quote: Everything we hear is an opinion, not a fact. Everything we see is a perspective, not the truth.
quotes.author: Marcus Aurelius (misattributed)
